title: Senior Project Engineer
description:
1. JOB DESCRIPTION

Job Title

Senior project Engineer

Occupation

PROJECT MANAGEMENT MANAGER

Job Description & Requirements

Job Responsibilities

· Conduct and review engineering calculations for equipment sizing, material selection, and system design.

· Lead the development of detailed design documents, including process flow diagrams (PFDs), piping and instrumentation diagrams (P&IDs), and system layouts.

· Oversee and coordinate with multidisciplinary teams to ensure seamless integration of gas, chemical, and water waste systems into overall project designs.

· Ensure strict compliance with safety protocols, industry standards, and regulatory requirements for gas and chemical systems.

· Conduct risk assessments, process hazard analyses (PHA), HAZOP, and failure mode and effects analysis (FMEA) to enhance safety and reliability.

· Evaluate new technologies and engineering solutions to improve system performance and efficiency.

· Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior engineers, ensuring high-quality design and implementation.

· Manage project timelines, budgets, and stakeholder communication, ensuring successful project execution.

· Collaborate with procurement and vendors to assess equipment specifications, cost analysis, and supplier qualifications.

· Troubleshoot and resolve complex engineering challenges, implementing best practices for system optimization.

· Perform any ad-hoc duties as assigned.

Requirements:

· Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related technical field.

· Minimum 5 years of experience in engineering roles related to gas, chemical, or water waste systems.

· Strong expertise in engineering calculations, equipment selection, and detailed design development.

· Experience with process safety management (PSM), risk assessments, and regulatory compliance.

· Proficiency in AutoCAD, SolidWorks, or other engineering design software is preferred.

· Strong project management skills, with the ability to lead cross-functional teams.

· Proficient in Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.

· Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills.

· Must be able to communicate in Mandarin to liaise with Mandarin-speaking associates.

postedCompany.description:
Suntec Construction Engineering Pte. Ltd. originated from Jianxin Engineering Installation Co., Ltd. in Suzhou, China. As a professional mechanical and electrical installation contractor, we specialize in the production and installation of large-scale air conditioning, HVAC, fire protection, process, and various special gas pipelines in clean rooms. Our services also cover multiple fields, including construction, manufacturing, energy, and transportation.

  We have a highly qualified and experienced professional team. Our technical personnel have many years of experience in mechanical and electrical engineering and can provide customers with comprehensive and high-quality technical support and services.

  We have always been committed to providing customers with the best quality services, adhering to the service concept of "customer first, quality first", strictly following national standards and customer requirements, and ensuring that each project can be completed on time, with quality, and quantity.

In the future, we will continue to adhere to the development concept of "people-oriented, technological innovation", continuously improve our service level and quality, continuously explore and innovate, and provide customers with more high-quality, efficient, and comprehensive mechanical and electrical equipment installation and technical services.
postedCompany.name: SUNTEC CONSTRUCTION ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
